calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Of Proration
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Weiss for Lawrence Minney (Petitioner/Trustee).
Collin Kelley for Laurie Goldman (Beneficiary).
Paul Frimmer appeared by telephone for Doctors Without Borders (Respondent).

The Court asks if the Parties have talked to each other about how to proceed. Mr. Kelley stated that there is the possibility of submitting on the pleadings unless the Court wants more information. Mr. Frimmer stated that he submits on the pleadings. Mr. Weiss stated that the Trustee is not a Beneficiary and has no interest in the outcome, that the Trustee has a desire to do what the intent was of the Settlor, that the language is very clear and that the expenses and the income taxes are going to be paid before anything else. Mr. Weiss submits on the pleadings. Mr. Kelley stated that there is a clear process of the steps that are to take place. The Petition for Determination of Proration is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
